title: Anchor Watch
doc:
midl: 1.0.0
meta:
  title: Anchor Watch
  description: Depth below transducer, heading and anchor status while at anchor.
  useCase: Riding at anchor and watching depth and swing.
  agentNotes: Choose when the user is anchored or asks about depth, swing or anchor watch.
  tags: [anchor, depth, anchorage, watch]
screens:
  - id: anchor
    meta:
      title: Anchor
      useCase: Keep an anchor watch on depth and heading.
    elements:
      depth:
        type: single-value
        name: DEPTH
        format: { unit: m }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: environment.depth.belowTransducer }
      heading:
        type: compass
        name: HEADING
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.headingTrue }
          dir: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.headingTrue }
      status:
        type: text
        name: STATE
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.state }
    layout:
      flow: row
      children:
        - element: depth
        - flow: col
          children:
            - element: heading
            - element: status
    variants:
      - class: square-480
        layout:
          flow: row
          children:
            - element: depth
            - flow: col
              children:
                - element: heading
                - element: status

title: Electrical
doc:
midl: 1.0.0
meta:
  title: Electrical
  description: Battery state of charge, bus voltage, charge current and a solar trend.
  useCase: Watching the house bank and charging at anchor or under way.
  agentNotes: Choose when the user asks about batteries, charge, voltage, solar or power.
  tags: [electrical, battery, power, solar]
screens:
  - id: power
    meta:
      title: Power
      useCase: Monitor the house bank and charging.
    elements:
      soc:
        type: bar
        name: SOC
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: electrical.batteries.house.capacity.stateOfCharge }
      volts:
        type: gauge
        name: VOLTS
        format: { unit: V }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: electrical.batteries.house.voltage }
      solar:
        type: trend
        name: SOLAR
        format: { unit: W }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: electrical.solar.0.panelPower }
      amps:
        type: single-value
        name: CURRENT
        format: { unit: A }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: electrical.batteries.house.current }
    layout:
      rows: 2
      cols: 2
      cells:
        - element: soc
        - element: volts
        - element: solar
        - element: amps
    variants:
      - class: square-480
        layout:
          rows: 2
          cols: 2
          cells:
            - element: soc
            - element: volts
            - element: solar
            - element: amps

title: Engine & Systems
doc:
midl: 1.0.0
meta:
  title: Engine & Systems
  description: Engine RPM and coolant temperature gauges, fuel level and oil pressure.
  useCase: Motoring or monitoring the engine and tanks.
  agentNotes: Choose when the user asks about the engine, RPM, temperature, fuel or oil.
  tags: [engine, systems, motor, fuel]
screens:
  - id: engine
    meta:
      title: Engine
      useCase: Keep an eye on the engine while motoring.
    elements:
      rpm:
        type: gauge
        name: RPM
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: propulsion.main.revolutions }
      temp:
        type: gauge
        name: COOLANT
        format: { unit: degC }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: propulsion.main.temperature }
      fuel:
        type: bar
        name: FUEL
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: tanks.fuel.0.currentLevel }
      oil:
        type: single-value
        name: OIL
        format: { unit: bar }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: propulsion.main.oilPressure }
    layout:
      rows: 2
      cols: 2
      cells:
        - element: rpm
        - element: temp
        - element: fuel
        - element: oil
    variants:
      - class: square-480
        layout:
          rows: 2
          cols: 2
          cells:
            - element: rpm
            - element: temp
            - element: fuel
            - element: oil

title: Navigation
doc:
midl: 1.0.0
meta:
  title: Navigation
  description: Course to the next waypoint — distance, bearing, COG and cross-track error.
  useCase: Making a passage toward a waypoint or destination.
  agentNotes: Choose when the user asks about course, next waypoint, ETA or how far to go.
  tags: [navigation, course, waypoint, passage]
screens:
  - id: nav
    meta:
      title: Course
      useCase: Watch progress toward the active waypoint.
    elements:
      dtw:
        type: single-value
        name: DTW
        format: { unit: nm }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.courseGreatCircle.nextPoint.distance }
      btw:
        type: single-value
        name: BTW
        format: { unit: deg }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.courseGreatCircle.nextPoint.bearingTrue }
      cog:
        type: compass
        name: COG
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.courseOverGroundTrue }
          dir: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.courseOverGroundTrue }
      xte:
        type: bar
        name: XTE
        format: { unit: m }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.courseGreatCircle.crossTrackError }
    layout:
      rows: 2
      cols: 2
      cells:
        - element: dtw
        - element: btw
        - element: cog
        - element: xte
    variants:
      - class: square-480
        layout:
          rows: 2
          cols: 2
          cells:
            - element: dtw
            - element: btw
            - element: cog
            - element: xte

title: Racing / VMG
doc:
midl: 1.0.0
meta:
  title: Racing / VMG
  description: Apparent-wind rose, a VMG trend, autopilot state and a tack button.
  useCase: Performance sailing and racing — chasing VMG and managing tacks.
  agentNotes: Choose when the user is racing or asks about VMG, performance or tacking.
  tags: [racing, vmg, performance, sailing]
screens:
  - id: race
    meta:
      title: Race
      useCase: Optimize VMG and manage the autopilot while racing.
    elements:
      wind:
        type: windrose
        name: WIND
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: environment.wind.speedApparent }
          dir: { kind: signalk, path: environment.wind.angleApparent }
      vmg:
        type: trend
        name: VMG
        format: { unit: kn }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: performance.velocityMadeGood }
      ap:
        type: autopilot
        name: PILOT
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: steering.autopilot.state }
      tack:
        type: button
        name: TACK
        action: { kind: command, target: steering.autopilot.tack }
    layout:
      rows: 2
      cols: 2
      cells:
        - element: wind
        - element: vmg
        - element: ap
        - element: tack
    variants:
      - class: square-480
        layout:
          rows: 2
          cols: 2
          cells:
            - element: wind
            - element: vmg
            - element: ap
            - element: tack

title: Wind & Steering
doc:
midl: 1.0.0
meta:
  title: Wind & Steering
  description: Apparent-wind rose with SOG and heading for upwind steering.
  useCase: Trimming and steering upwind on a beat.
  agentNotes: Choose when the user is sailing upwind or asks about wind angle / VMG.
  tags: [sailing, upwind, wind, steering]
screens:
  - id: dash
    meta:
      title: Wind
      useCase: Read wind angle and speed while steering.
    elements:
      wind:
        type: windrose
        name: WIND
        meta: { description: Apparent wind angle and speed. }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: environment.wind.speedApparent }
          dir: { kind: signalk, path: environment.wind.angleApparent }
      sog:
        type: single-value
        name: SOG
        format: { unit: kn }
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.speedOverGround }
      hdg:
        type: compass
        name: HDG
        bindings:
          value: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.headingTrue }
          dir: { kind: signalk, path: navigation.headingTrue }
    layout:
      flow: row
      children:
        - element: wind
        - flow: col
          children:
            - element: sog
            - element: hdg
    variants:
      - class: square-480
        layout:
          flow: row
          children:
            - element: wind
            - flow: col
              children:
                - element: sog
                - element: hdg
